title: campuloclinium parvulum
intro: Campuloclinium parvulum, also known as the small false hebe, is a shrub native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Campuloclinium parvulum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, high blood pressure, and joint pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used in folk medicine in various parts of South America.
